comparables_analysis.spacex_premium_justification: Highest growth + Starlink monopoly + Starship optionality + Musk premium

technical_indicators.volume_status: Low - 57% of average. Distribution without panic.

bull_case.description: Starship clears FAA + Starlink 15M+ subs by end-2026 + multiple expansion

base_case.description: Starship returns mid-year + Starlink maintains 50% growth + growth normalizes

bear_case.description: Starship delayed past 2026 + Starlink growth slows to 25% + macro deterioration

valuation_score.rationale: 125x P/S TTM is extreme. Even forward P/S 75x (at 67% growth) is very elevated vs peers. Stars at 8-10x, Amazon 4x. Some premium justified but risk/reward neutral-to-negative at current levels.

macro_score.rationale: Fed turned hawkish (dot plot implies hikes, not cuts in 2026). Higher-for-longer rates negative for high-multiple growth stocks. VIX elevated post-selloff. Limited positive macro catalysts near-term.

technical_score.rationale: Deeply oversold (RSI 28) but price below 20MA and 50MA. MACD bearish. Volume light on decline = distribution, not capitulation. No clear buy signal yet. Support at $150.

institutional_score.rationale: Keybanc initiated Strong Buy on June 22. Analyst consensus target $187.80. IPO created many new holders. Stock down 24% from peak may attract institutional interest. Score limited by lack of broader coverage yet.

catalyst_score.rationale: Starship V3 progress ongoing (full-stack reusability). Starlink at 10M+ subs growing 50% YoY. Massive $100.8B cash. Government contracts continuing. Score reduced by FAA grounding and post-IPO selloff overhang.

overall_scores.score_interpretation: Middle of the road - significant risks balanced with substantial upside potential
